prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built **Rover V8 3.5L (engine code: 14C/15C)** with forged internals from **JE Pistons (9.5:1 compression, 95mm bore)** and **Crower billet crankshaft (3.21-inch stroke)**, paired with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** and **ARP 2000 head studs** for 500+ hp reliability.

Custom **Turbo Smart GTX4202R (84mm, .82 A/R, ball-bearing) turbocharger** with **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **Precision Turbo 46mm external wastegate dump tube**, mated to a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Janspeed Engineering** with **Scorpion 2.5-inch downpipe** and **MagnaFlow 30986 mufflers** for optimized spool and backpressure.

Full **Emerald K6 ECU standalone management** with **Bosch 0280155861 850cc/min injectors**, **Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump**, and **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor (30-0300)** for precise AFR targeting, tuned on a **Dynapack hub dyno** with **custom camshafts from Piper Cams (280° duration, .500-inch lift)** and **Crane Cams adjustable cam gears**.
estetica: Full **RML Group SD1 Vitesse Group A homologation-style widebody kit** with **carbon fiber front splitter (20mm overhang)**, **rear diffuser by KW Automotive**, and **custom aluminum rear wing (300mm chord, 1200mm span) modeled after the 1985 BTCC-spec car**, all finished in **PPG Rover Flame Red (code: 317)** with **bare carbon fiber weave accents**.

**OZ Racing Superleggera III 17x9.5-inch wheels (ET15, 5x120 PCD)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (275/40 R17)** tires, paired with **AP Racing CP5270 calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear)** clamping **356mm two-piece rotors** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge 6AN braided stainless steel brake lines**.

**Full interior retrim by Trim Developments** featuring **Recaro SRD Evo II seats (HANS-compatible, carbon fiber backshells)** upholstered in **Bridge of Weir leather (Rover Flame Red with black Alcantara centers)**, **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **custom aluminum gauge pod housing Stack ST8100 digital dash** with **AIM MXS Strada data logger**.
